response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with deep TypeScript expertise and staff-level leadership credentials, but fundamentally misaligned with core position requirements. The role explicitly requires minimum 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions—resume shows zero Python (one of two required languages), no LLM/ML background, and no evidence of vector databases or RAG architecture work. Current MCP framework role at re:cinq (2 months) is a positive signal but too recent to demonstrate the required AI solution delivery depth. This is an infrastructure engineer beginning to work with AI tooling, not an AI systems specialist.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript expertise across 10+ years with production systems handling millions of requests per second, directly applicable to performance-critical AI deployments
Current role building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq aligns with forward-deployed GenAI platform needs
Proven staff-level technical leadership with mentoring experience and consulting background across multiple domains
concerns: No Python programming experience despite being one of two explicitly required languages for this AI engineering role
Resume demonstrates zero evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions—the hard minimum requirement—with no mention of LLMs, ML pipelines, model training, or AI systems architecture
Missing all three core AI technologies: no vector database experience, no RAG architecture work, and no LLM performance metrics or optimization knowledge
